name: Old Fashioned Fruitcake Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 15 x 10-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs, butter, condensed milk, and vanilla extract until well combined.
4. Add applesauce and blend well.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients (dates, chopped cherries, nuts, raisins) until evenly distributed.
6. Spread mixture evenly into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 35-40 minutes or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
9. If desired, sprinkle with confectioner's sugar before cutting into bars.
10. Store tightly covered at room temperature.
Yield: 3 -4 dozen bars
